import React from "react"; const ICONS = { profile: "M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2M12 11a4 4 0 1 0 0-8 4 4 0 0 0 0 8", handle: "M16 8a6 6 0 1 0-2.1 4.6c.6.8 1.6 1.4 2.6 1.4a4 4 0 0 0 0-8h-1v4", status: "M9 10h.01M15 10h.01M9.5 14c.7.7 1.7 1 2.5 1s1.8-.3 2.5-1", bell: "M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-12 0c0 7-3 7-3 9h18c0-2-3-2-3-9M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0", mail: "M4 4h16v16H4z M4 8l8 5 8-5", wave: "M3 16c2 0 2-4 4-4s2 4 4 4 2-4 4-4 2 4 4 4", volume: "M11 5 6 9H3v6h3l5 4V5z M15 9.5a4 4 0 0 1 0 5", haptics: "M12 2v4M12 18v4M4.93 4.93l2.83 2.83M16.24 16.24l2.83 2.83M2 12h4M18 12h4M4.93 19.07l2.83-2.83M16.24 7.76l2.83-2.83", block: "M19 5 5 19M5 5l14 14", eye: "M1 12s4-7 11-7 11 7 11 7-4 7-11 7S1 12 1 12zm11 4a4 4 0 1 0 0-8 4 4 0 0 0 0 8", chart: "M3 3v18h18M7 13l3 3 4-6 3 4", alert: "M12 9v4M12 17h.01M10.29 3.86 1.82 18a1 1 0 0 0 .86 1.5h18.64a1 1 0 0 0 .86-1.5L13.71 3.86a1 1 0 0 0-1.72 0z", folder: "M3 7h5l2 2h11v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H3a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V9a2 2 0 0 1 2-2z", compass: "M12 2v2M12 20v2M4.93 4.93l1.41 1.41M17.66 17.66l1.41 1.41M2 12h2m16 0h2M7.76 7.76 6 18l10.24-1.76L18 6 7.76 7.76z", help: "M9.09 9a3 3 0 1 1 5.82 1c0 1.5-1.1 2.1-1.9 2.6-.7.4-1.1.9-1.1 1.4V15m0 3h.01", info: "M12 2a10 10 0 1 0 0 20 10 10 0 0 0 0-20zm0 6h.01M12 12v6", terms: "M6 4h9l3 3v13H6z M6 10h12M9 14h6", logout: "M9 21H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4M16 17l5-5-5-5M21 12H9", chevron: "M9 18l6-6-6-6" }; function Icon({ name }) { const path = ICONS[name]; if (!path) return null; return ( ); } export default function SettingsPanel({ settings = {}, onUpdateSettings = () => {}, onLogout = () => {}, onEditProfile = () => {}, onChangeUsername = () => {}, onEditStatus = () => {}, onOpenBlocked = () => {}, onOpenVisibility = () => {}, onOpenDataSharing = () => {}, onReportProblem = () => {}, onOpenMyRooms = () => {}, onOpenDiscoverPrefs = () => {}, onOpenHelp = () => {}, onOpenAbout = () => {}, onOpenTerms = () => {} }) { const { mentions = true, invites = true, waveAlerts = false, sounds = true, haptics = true, analytics = false, visibility = "friends" } = settings; const Section = ({ title, children }) => (

); const Item = ({ icon, label, hint, trailing, onClick }) => ( ); const Toggle = ({ checked, onChange }) => ( ); return (

onOpenVisibility(visibility)} /> onUpdateSettings({ analytics: value })} />} onClick={onOpenDataSharing} />
} onClick={onLogout} />
); }
